prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `652646ff`.
codex_response:
Implemented `652646ff` as fixed 6x6 hollow-diamond recovery: the verifier fits each non-background color to the canonical diamond template, keeps colors with a unique clipped placement, orders them by signal-on-signal occlusion, and stacks the restored diamonds vertically. I used the opus hint as a starting point, but rejected the sonnet hint’s “extract 3x3 then mirror” framing and documented that correction in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_652646ff/notes.md).

Task package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_652646ff/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_652646ff/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_652646ff/generator.py), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_652646ff/helpers.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_652646ff/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed in `arc2/dsl_ext.py`; the task-local helper just defines the diamond template and clipping/block utilities. The generator matches the task family by explicitly building overlapping full diamonds bottom-to-top, allowing border clipping, and adding only sparse singleton noise on background cells.

Verification passed on `5/5` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/652646ff/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/652646ff/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/652646ff/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/652646ff/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/652646ff/previews/preview_03.png). I also visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/652646ff/previews/preview_01.png); it looks on-distribution.
